fix_summary: Details on how to improve error messages and logging effectiveness need clarification and expansion.
rejection_reasons: Insufficient detail in handling user-facing error messages.
Lack of clarity on performance concerns related to logging.
revision_requests: Clarify how error messages will be generated and ensure they include specific user guidance for resolution.
Expand on the logging mechanism to include severity levels (info, warning, error) and context about the failures.
Detail how we will ensure that the system performance is not negatively impacted due to logging overhead, especially during load.
